message:
Pass 2 bead review: resolve overlaps, add user value/AC, decompose recipes, fix structure

- Merge 4 duplicate Galaxy-Brain beads into existing bd-1lgz8.* (closed bd-3kjg0, bd-rvz9p, bd-1sm6v, bd-1sm6v.1)
- Add User Value + Acceptance Criteria to all 16 epic descriptions
- Decompose 3 recipe epics (B/D/F) into 10 implementation subtasks with dependency chains
- Demote SOS Barrier (bd-1d3z0) from P1 to P2
- Fix orphaned bd-24t4h parent assignment
- Fix evidence ledger dependency direction (bd-3rss7 → bd-fp38v)
- Add cross-epic deps: arena/S3-FIFO → profiling, recipes → evidence/decision layer
- Add Tier B deps: flat-combining → ArcSwap, lenses/reversible → HAMT
- Wire dirty tracking benchmark to existing Quotient Filter bead
- bv validates: zero cycles, zero articulation points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
